name: Mediterraneamente: Formentera
trigger: Start of the Mediterranean summer season
audience: young adults 18-34 in Spain and export markets who love summer and the coast
positioning: Estrella Damm as the soundtrack and companion of the Mediterranean summer.

creative.headline: This is the Mediterranean way
creative.primary_text: A summer on Formentera, friends, the sea and a cold Estrella Damm. The little ritual that starts the season. Mediterraneamente.

results_summary.note: Launched the franchise; very strong reach and engagement, modest direct conversion.

name: Mediterraneamente: Santa Clara Fest
trigger: Festival season and summer music moment
positioning: Estrella Damm at the heart of the summer festival and music culture.

creative.headline: The festival of the summer
creative.primary_text: An island, a secret festival and the song of the summer by The Vaccines. Bring your friends. Mediterraneamente.

results_summary.note: Music tie-in drove the highest engagement and video views of the period.

name: Mediterraneamente: Las Pequenas Cosas
audience: adults 25-45 who value friendship and Mediterranean summers
positioning: Estrella Damm celebrates the small, shared moments that make the Mediterranean summer.

creative.headline: It's the little things
creative.primary_text: A reunion, a coastal town, and the friends who always come back. Estrella Damm is there for the little things that mean everything. Mediterraneamente.

results_summary.note: Emotional short-film format produced strong completion rates and brand recall.

name: Mediterraneamente: The Life of Us
trigger: Start of summer and the desire to live in the moment
positioning: Estrella Damm as the reminder to live the present and enjoy life together.

creative.headline: Live the life of us
creative.primary_text: A summer story narrated by Peter Dinklage about choosing the people and moments that matter. Mediterraneamente.

results_summary.note: Celebrity narration lifted reach; engagement strong but slightly below 2016.

name: The End of Plastic Pack Rings
trigger: Brand sustainability commitment to protect the Mediterranean sea
positioning: Estrella Damm as a brand that protects the Mediterranean it celebrates.

creative.headline: Protecting the sea we love
creative.primary_text: We are replacing plastic pack rings to help protect the Mediterranean. Because the sea gives us everything. Mediterraneamente.

results_summary.note: Purpose message drove shares and positive sentiment but weak direct sales response.

name: Mediterraneamente: Act III - Commitment
trigger: Reopening of social life and renewed environmental commitment
positioning: Estrella Damm pairs the joy of returning to social moments with a commitment to the sea.

creative.headline: Our commitment to the Mediterranean
creative.primary_text: Back to the terraces, the coast and the people we missed, with a promise to protect what we love. Mediterraneamente.

results_summary.note: Hybrid emotional + purpose message; mid engagement, below-average conversion.

name: Cold & Crisp Summer Offer
trigger: Heatwave and direct summer sales push
audience: adults 18-34 buying beer for terraces, parks and home
positioning: Estrella Damm as the perfectly cold, crisp Mediterranean lager for hot days.

creative.headline: Ice-cold. Crisp. Estrella Damm.
creative.primary_text: The sun is out. Grab a perfectly cold Estrella Damm for the terrace or the park. Stock up for the weekend now.

results_summary.note: Lower CTR but by far the best CPA and ROAS; product-led + offer converted strongly.

name: Terrace Retargeting Push
trigger: Summer terrace season, retargeting engaged users
audience: users who engaged with summer brand content in the last 30 days
positioning: Estrella Damm as the easy choice to complete the terrace plan.

creative.headline: Your terrace plan is missing one thing
creative.primary_text: You were thinking about it. Make the plan real with a cold Estrella Damm. Find it near you or order for the weekend.

results_summary.note: Best converter in the dataset; retargeting warm audiences with a product-led, action message.

name: Mediterraneamente: Summer '78
positioning: Estrella Damm bridges generations through the timeless Mediterranean summer.

creative.headline: One summer, two generations
creative.primary_text: A 1978 summer remembered today, the same sea, the same songs, the same Estrella Damm. Some things never change. Mediterraneamente.

results_summary.note: Nostalgia angle delivered the highest CTR and best awareness-era ROAS to date.
